question: Will the average price of diesel in the US have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-04-12?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/GASDESW once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-04-12 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-04-02) was 5.401. (The latest value released in US Diesel Sales Price from the release Gasoline and Diesel Fuel Update.)
background: The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: Weighted average based on sampling of approximately 350 retail outlets, as reported for the week. See (http://www.eia.doe.gov/oil_gas/petroleum/data_publications/wrgp/mogas_home_page.html) for further definitions..  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Dollars per Gallon.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Not Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Weekly, Ending Monday
